description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden shelving unit with a cabinet base. The upper section features three open shelves supported by side panels, ideal for displaying books, decor, or storage bins. The lower section consists of a two-door cabinet, providing concealed storage space for larger or less visually appealing items. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the piece a warm, natural appearance. The design is simple and functional, with clean lines and no visible hardware on the cabinet doors. This type of furniture is commonly found in urban environments such as offices, living rooms, or communal spaces.
description: A tall wooden shelving unit with three open shelves and a two-door cabinet base, featuring a natural wood finish and clean, modern lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves above a two-door cabinet with no visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and the cabinet, as well as the open structure of the shelving.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wood back panel and the full height of the unit.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the shelf depth and open side supports.
